text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Senior year is here at last, and as for Mejiro
Ardan's progress...

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
Continuing with the latest Twinkle Series news,
we now return to our coverage oooon...

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
The self-same racer who made such a splash
during last year's Classics, a young lady of the
Mejiro family, Mejiro Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Announcer B
text_block_list.text:
I tell you, her showing at the Japanese Derby was
one for the ages. And I'm hoping for even more
astonishing feats in her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...While I am honored, this is also a touch
embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's amazing performance in the
Classics has completely changed the public's
perception of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People have stopped referencing her sister's
accomplishments, and they're finally recognizing
Ardan for herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Announcer B
text_block_list.text:
All that said, we'll have to wait and see just how
well she'll be able to keep up with Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text: Is Oguri Cap really in a league of her own?

text_block_list.name: Announcer B
text_block_list.text:
I think that's a good way to put it, yes. There are
plenty of other Umamusume who are just as
strong or popular but...

text_block_list.name: Announcer B
text_block_list.text:
So far, she's overturned expectations every time
she's hit the track... Speaking as a fan, there's
simply nothing more thrilling than that.

text_block_list.name: Announcer B
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure there's ever been another runner with
the same level of sheer inspirational star power as
Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Announcer B
text_block_list.text:
Her running seizes the attention of her fans and
opponents alike. That's the mark of a
generational talent right there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...As the star of the Twinkle Series, Oguri Cap has
countless lights and cameras in her orbit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I believe that to be true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The light Oguri emanates when she runs... is
almost overwhelmingly powerful. Extraordinarily
so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It may sound strange... but I can't help believing
that her radiance promises a place in history.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Whereas the light I have at this moment remains
fleeting and faint compared to that of Oguri and
her closest rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Which is precisely why the following occurs to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If I were to shine brightly enough to drown out
their light—Oguri's included...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wonder just how many hearts in which that would
leave a lasting impression.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, what I'm about to say will sound over
the top, but please refrain from laughing as you
listen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: In the ultimate moment of this senior year...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wish to create a turning point that changes this
seemingly inevitable path in history.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I will defeat Oguri and turn the valuation of all
things—as they are in this moment—on its head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Moving forward, that is to be my goal.
choice_data_list:
..."The steepest, most strenuous path of all,"
right?

..."The steepest, most strenuous path of all,"
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I would not have made it this far alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't have done it without my precious rivals
or the wonderful races we've run together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Nor without you, Trainer. You had faith in me,
walked beside me, and guided me towards the
future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Had even one of you been missing from my
journey, I highly doubt I would be standing here
now, in this moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I am truly grateful. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Will you be there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
On this path—the steepest, most strenuous
path—to reshape the history people dream of...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Will you be there... with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't even have to think about it. As Mejiro
Ardan's trainer, I know exactly what I need to do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ..."Pulverize"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Heh! Hehehe! ...Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I-I do apologize, Trainer! It's just that your
choice of words was... rather amusing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Still... Hehe, there's something wonderful about
it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Strong, courageous, and refreshing... Yes, I think
I'd like to use phrasing like that myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan seems to have enjoyed the way I
put that, but after all that praise, I'm the one who
ends up blushing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Let's align our sights on history itself, and—at its
turning point—obliterate it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our new goal set, it's time to take on senior
year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now that our objective's decided...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Let's pay the shrine a New Year's visit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Submitting to Mejiro Ardan's will, I head along to
the shrine with her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've always gone with other members
of the Mejiro family to visit a shrine at New
Year's.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This year, however, I very much hoped to go with
you instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Why indeed. I shall leave the answer to your
imagination, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh? There's no line at the moment. Shall we use
this opportunity to go and offer our prayers?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: What will you be wishing for, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! A wish on my behalf? Thank you very
much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I was also thinking of asking for your continued
good health. Could this be a case of us... looking
out for one another?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I must say, though, you needn't wish for me "to
stay healthy"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I trust that as long as you're with me, I'll always be
feeling my very best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, our shrine visit comes to an end.
Now we're ready to take on the new year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You're quite avaricious, aren't you,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I am also planning to continue working hard so
that I can scale the heights you wished for me to
reach.
choice_data_list: I've got high hopes for you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: By all means, hope away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, our shrine visit comes to an end.
Now we're ready to take on the new year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, I'm just... a little surprised.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: After all, that wish has already—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I was also thinking of wishing for your happiness,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hence, my surprise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well then, shall we both pray for one another's
happiness?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our shrine visit ends with us both wishing for the
other to be happy. Now we're ready to take on
the new year!
